description: This agent is part of **nephew's** dispatch — it does not commission itself. Invocation flows from [`nephew`](../nephew.md) (the Orchestrator Agent by Avery Goodman) based on intent fingerprint. See [`docs/standards/orchestration-hierarchy.md`](../../docs/standards/orchestration-hierarchy.md) for the full team map.
